description_long: This picnic table features a rectangular wooden tabletop composed of wide, weathered planks with a rustic gray finish. The table is supported by two robust trestle-style legs, each forming an A-frame with diagonal braces for added stability. A thick horizontal stretcher connects the two legs at the base, providing structural reinforcement and a classic farmhouse aesthetic. The surface of the tabletop is flat and spacious, suitable for group gatherings or outdoor dining. The wood grain and slightly uneven coloration suggest a reclaimed or treated wood material, designed to withstand outdoor conditions. There are no attached benches or visible umbrella holes, giving the table a versatile and open design.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden picnic table with a rustic gray plank tabletop and trestle-style A-frame legs connected by a horizontal stretcher. The design is robust and open, suitable for outdoor use.
description_view_0: The table is seen from the narrow end, highlighting the A-frame leg and diagonal braces beneath the tabletop.
description_view_1: A broad side view shows the full length of the tabletop and the connecting stretcher between the two legs.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this end view displays the opposite A-frame leg and the symmetry of the support structure.
description_view_3: Another side view, mirroring view 1, with the tabletop and stretcher clearly visible.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by two A-frame trestle legs, each reinforced with diagonal braces and connected by a thick horizontal stretcher at the base.
